by_the_numbers.label: Market cap lost when Altruist Hazel launched
AI models running in production at DBS
Advisor adoption rate at Morgan Stanley

editors_note: This week's defining story is not a product launch — it's a market reaction. The $150B sell-off triggered by Altruist's Hazel is the clearest signal yet that institutional capital now views AI-native platforms as an existential threat to traditional advisory models. The race to scale is no longer optional.
